address.address: Navarathna Agrahara,Sadahalli P.O., Off Bengaluru International Airport India

pos_sentences: I was a student of the ECE branch, and for the ECE branch, it has a very good R&D center.
You will get various options there, such as programming, Internet of Things, and operating systems, which provide you with good career opportunities.
I cannot say that the placement of this college is very good, but considering the price at which this college provides education, the placements are good.

There are scholarships available for those who come from a minority background. Additionally, for students who perform excellently academically, there will be no fee taken from them for that particular year.
The campus inculcates the best engineering practices among students through quality education, creativity, innovation, and entrepreneurial skills.

Best infrastructure encompasses everything. Every hostel needs maintenance for smooth operations. Our college has the best mechanism for maintaining the hostels. We have numerous blocks for students to stay separately and happily, and they are treated like family. When it comes to food, they ensure food hygiene.
It is a very good college and its the best all-around college for studies, culture, sports, fests, etc.
neg_sentences: The placement in college is very bad; almost no company is coming for final year students.
I paid less money compared to others who got a seat through the management quota, as I got a seat in the government quota.
As this was my college, I would say it was a very bad college. However, it was an average college with average facilities and minimal resources for the students.
